text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The upcoming Arima Kinen is the talk of the
town, everyone being excited to see Oguri Cap
and Tamamo Cross face off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek, a quick-thinking runner with high
endurance who's making quite a name for herself,
is also slated to run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One feels that it's fate she'll be able to run in
the same race as such great rivals, and that
they're destined to make it a festival to
remember.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she's eager to run against these incredible
Umamusume in her upcoming senior year, there's
another race she must conquer first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We begin making final preparations for the Tokyo
Daishoten, which she plans to win so she can start
her senior year at the top of the regionals.
